headline: 4 HMO Stocks to Watch Despite Escalating Costs, Nursing Shortage
summary: The Medical-HMO industry leverages technology capabilities and M&A to fuel growth. Yet rising medical costs, workforce shortages and policy shifts pose roadblocks. UNH, CI, HUM and CNC are likely to navigate industry storms.

headline: EO Care Appoints William Fleming and Kristi Savacool to Board of Directors, Reinforcing Its Leadership in Clinically Guided Cannabinoid Symptom Management
summary: BOSTON, March 11, 2026--EO Care, Inc., a leading provider of clinically guided cannabinoid-based symptom management, today announced the appointment of William Fleming, PharmD, and Kristi Savacool to its Board of Directors. Both join as directors and investors, further strengthening the company’s governance, strategic depth, and national influence as cannabinoid care advances into mainstream healthcare delivery.
